jobs.job:
Level 1 Technical Support Technician – All-Access Infotech

Responsibilities:
- Respond to support requests via phone, email, and ticketing systems
- Troubleshoot Windows workstations, Microsoft 365, email, printers, and software issues
- Perform password resets and user account support
- Diagnose basic network issues (IP, DNS, DHCP, Wi-Fi, VPN)
- Use remote tools to resolve technical issues
- Document tickets clearly with troubleshooting steps and resolutions
- Manage and prioritize multiple tickets
- Escalate complex issues to higher-level support

Skills:
- Windows operating systems
- Microsoft 365
- Hardware and software troubleshooting
- Networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, IP)
- Strong communication skills
- Ticketing/documentation systems

Preferred:
- Help desk or MSP experience
- Experience with tools like ConnectWise or Autotask
- CompTIA A+ or similar certification
jobs.resume:
1) Tailored Resume

Name Lastname
City, ST • email@example.com • (555) 555-5555 • linkedin.com/in/namelastname

Professional Summary
A+ certified Level 1 Help Desk Technician with experience in 24x7, high-uptime environments. Strong with Windows 10/11, Microsoft 365 (Outlook/Teams/OneDrive), Active Directory user administration, printers/MFPs, and basic networking (IP/DNS/DHCP, Wi-Fi/VPN). Proven ticket triage, prioritization, remote support, and clear documentation aligned to ITIL-style incident workflows. MSP-ready; experienced with ServicePro and adaptable to common MSP PSA/RMM tools and processes. Available for full-time L1 Help Desk roles (on-site or remote).

Core Skills
- End-User Support: Windows 10/11; Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive); software installs/updates; profile repairs; email troubleshooting; password resets
- Identity/Access & File Services: Active Directory (users, groups, permissions), file share access, secure terminations, least-privilege practices
- Remote/Hardware/Print: Microsoft Remote Desktop; desktops/laptops/peripherals; printers/MFPs (drivers, print queues, scan-to-email)
- Networking Basics: IP configuration, DNS/DHCP checks, Wi-Fi/VPN connectivity, ping/tracert; appropriate escalation when beyond L1 scope
- Service Delivery: Ticket triage by impact/urgency; time entry and notes; documentation and quick guides; knowledge base contributions; customer communication
- Tools: ServicePro ticketing; Microsoft 365 apps; Microsoft Remote Desktop; Excel; SQL Server (basic reporting); familiar with ConnectWise/Autotask concepts; VPN clients; printer drivers

Selected Ticket Scenarios
- Outlook profile rebuilds, mailbox access issues, and OneDrive sync repairs to restore email and file access
- VPN/Wi-Fi connectivity troubleshooting (IP/DNS/DHCP checks) to re-establish remote access
- Printer/MFP deployments and queue remediations, including scan-to-email configuration

Experience
PC/LAN Technician (Contract) — Sycuan Casino Resort, El Cajon, CA
July 2024 - November 2024
- Triaged and resolved Level 1 incidents/requests in ServicePro, prioritizing by impact and urgency to improve response times and reduce backlog in a high-uptime casino environment.
- Supported Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365 (Outlook/Teams/OneDrive); performed software installs/updates and profile repairs to restore productivity.
- Administered AD user accounts and groups; granted file share access and executed secure terminations per procedure.
- Delivered remote and deskside support using Microsoft Remote Desktop; diagnosed desktops, laptops, phones, and peripherals.
- Deployed and troubleshot printers/MFPs, drivers, and print queues; resolved scan-to-email and network print issues.
- Performed L1 networking checks (IP config, DNS/DHCP, Wi-Fi/VPN) and escalated appropriately with detailed notes.
- Authored quick guides and delivered user trainings; produced Excel reports from SQL Server extracts to support operations.
- Result: Reduced ticket backlog and improved response times; increased visibility for events through reporting.

Technical Support Associate (Overnight, Contract) — The Home Depot, San Diego, CA
April 2024 - May 2024
- Provided overnight endpoint and peripheral support for inventory and delivery systems to sustain store operations.
- Diagnosed and resolved hardware/software issues and performed maintenance to maintain system uptime.
- Reconciled data using Excel and internal inventory systems to improve accuracy.

Additional Experience (Part-time)
Personal Trainer & Operations — YMCA of San Diego, San Diego, CA
November 2024 - Present
- Coordinated vendor deliveries and equipment upgrades with minimal disruption to members.
- Created training materials and coached users; reinforced safety, clear communication, and documentation habits.

Projects
OpenAI Resume Tailor (Python)
- Built a CLI-driven pipeline to analyze job descriptions and generate tailored resumes with structured outputs.
- Reduced manual customization effort and improved ATS alignment through targeted keyword matching and consistent formatting.

Education & Certifications
- BA, Economics — University of California, San Diego (2020)
- CompTIA A+ Certification

2) Keywords (ATS-friendly)
- Level 1 Help Desk
- Service Desk
- Windows 10
- Windows 11
- Microsoft 365
- Outlook
- Teams
- OneDrive
- Active Directory
- AD users and groups
- File share access
- Password resets
- Profile repairs
- Printers
- MFPs
- Printer drivers
- Print queues
- Scan-to-email
- Microsoft Remote Desktop
- Remote support
- VPN
- Wi-Fi
- DNS
- DHCP
- IP configuration
- Ping
- Tracert
- Ticketing system
- ServicePro
- Ticket triage
- Prioritization
- Escalation
- Documentation
- Knowledge base
- ITIL incident workflows
- Customer communication
- Excel
- SQL Server
- MSP
- PSA
- RMM (familiarity)
- ConnectWise (concepts)
- Autotask (concepts)

3) Missing Skills
- Must-have gaps
  - Hands-on experience with MSP PSA/RMM platforms (e.g., ConnectWise Manage/Control, Autotask, RMM agents)
  - Deeper Microsoft 365/Azure AD admin (shared mailboxes, distribution groups, mailbox permissions, MFA enforcement)
  - Phone/call queue experience with metrics (calls per day, FCR, SLA/CSAT reporting)

- Nice-to-have gaps
  - Endpoint management/imaging (Intune/Autopilot/SCCM)
  - Basic macOS/iOS support and MDM exposure (Intune/Jamf)
  - PowerShell scripting for L1 automation
  - VoIP/Teams Phone basics (call queues, voicemail resets)
  - ITIL Foundation certification
  - Advanced networking concepts (VLANs, firewalls) beyond L1 basics

Name Lastname

Professional Summary
A+ certified IT Support Specialist (Level 1) with hands-on Windows 10/11 and Microsoft 365 support, Active Directory user administration, printer/MFP troubleshooting, and remote assistance in high-uptime, SLA-driven environments. Strong in ticket triage, documentation, and clear customer communication; comfortable with DNS/DHCP/IP fundamentals, VPN/Wi‑Fi connectivity, and endpoint diagnostics. Adaptable to MSP workflows and tools (ConnectWise/Autotask familiarity) and used to fast-paced, multi-ticket contexts. Willing to work shifts/after-hours typical for MSPs.

Core Skills
- Windows/Microsoft 365: Windows 10/11; Outlook, Teams, OneDrive; software installs/updates; profile repairs
- Identity/Access: Active Directory users, groups, permissions; password resets; file share access
- Remote Support: Microsoft Remote Desktop; Quick Assist (familiar); ConnectWise Control/ScreenConnect (familiar)
- Networking: IP addressing; DNS/DHCP checks; VPN/Wi‑Fi connectivity; ipconfig/ping/tracert
- Printers/MFPs: Drivers, queues, scan-to-email; network printing issues
- Hardware/Software: Desktops, laptops, phones, peripherals; imaging/installs; endpoint diagnostics
- Ticketing/Documentation: ServicePro; incident triage, prioritization, escalation; KB/quick guides; SLA focus; phone/email support (familiar)
- MSP Readiness: Multi-tenant mindset; ticket hygiene; FCR focus; clear escalations; context switching
- Reporting/Tools: Excel; SQL Server (data extracts/reporting)
- Certifications: CompTIA A+

PC/LAN Technician (Contract) — Sycuan Casino Resort | Jul 2024 – Nov 2024
- Managed a high-volume ServicePro queue in a 24/7, high-uptime environment; prioritized to SLAs and documented clear troubleshooting steps and resolutions.

- Performed basic network diagnostics (IP configuration, DNS/DHCP checks, VPN/Wi‑Fi connectivity; ipconfig/ping/tracert).

1) Tailored Resume

Name + Contact
Your Name, CompTIA A+
San Diego, CA | 555-555-5555 | your.email@example.com | linkedin.com/in/yourhandle

Professional Summary
Office/IT Support Technician with hands-on Windows 10/11, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, printers/MFPs, and ticket triage experience in high-uptime and overnight environments. Strengths in remote/deskside support, documentation and user training, inventory/vendor coordination, and Excel/SQL reporting. Known for calm triage, clear communication, and safeguarding access and confidential information. Seeking Help Desk/Service Desk, Desktop Support, or Office Services + IT hybrid roles.

Core Skills
- Windows 10/11; Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, OneDrive); user profile repair; desktop app support
- Active Directory (users, groups, permissions); access provisioning; onboarding/offboarding; least-privilege mindset
- Ticketing: ServicePro; familiarity with ServiceNow, Jira, Zendesk; incident/request triage; SLA awareness; escalation
- Remote/Deskside: Microsoft Remote Desktop; remote diagnostics; hardware break/fix (desktops, laptops, peripherals, phones)
- Print/Scan: Printers/MFPs; print queues; drivers; scan-to-email; network printing
- Networking basics: IP configuration; DNS/DHCP checks; VPN/Wi‑Fi troubleshooting
- Documentation/Training: SOPs; quick guides; knowledge base usage/contribution; user trainings
- Inventory/Operations: Asset tracking; vendor coordination; scheduling; equipment moves; mail/shipping logistics; room readiness
- Data/Reporting: Excel (lookups, pivots); SQL Server extracts; reconciliation
- Tools/Other: Adobe Acrobat and PDF editing; records/document control concepts; confidentiality/PII handling
- Familiar: Legal DMS concepts; quick to learn NetDocuments/iManage/iCreate

Experience
PC/LAN Technician (Contract) — Sycuan Casino Resort | Jul 2024 – Nov 2024
- Triaged incidents/requests in ServicePro, prioritizing high-impact issues to reduce backlog and improve response times in a high-uptime casino environment.
- Resolved Windows 10/11 and M365 (Outlook/Teams/OneDrive) issues; performed installs/updates and user profile repairs.
- Administered AD users, security groups, and file share permissions; supported onboarding/offboarding.
- Delivered remote and deskside support via Microsoft Remote Desktop; diagnosed hardware faults for desktops, laptops, peripherals, and phones.
- Deployed/troubleshot printers/MFPs, queues, drivers, and scan-to-email; coordinated vendors as needed.
- Performed basic network diagnostics (IP config, DNS/DHCP checks, VPN/Wi‑Fi).
- Authored quick guides and delivered brief trainings to reduce repeat tickets and speed adoption.
- Built Excel reports using SQL Server extracts to support events and operations, increasing decision-making visibility.

Personal Trainer & Fitness Coach (Office Services & Operations Support) — YMCA of San Diego | Nov 2024 – Present

Technical Support Associate (Seasonal/Contract, Overnight) — The Home Depot | Apr 2024 – May 2024
- Provided overnight IT support for inventory and delivery systems to sustain store operations during off-hours.
- Diagnosed endpoint/peripheral hardware and software issues; executed fixes to maintain uptime.

projects.name: OpenAI Resume Tailor
description: Built a modular, CLI‑driven pipeline to analyze job descriptions and generate tailored resumes, reducing manual customization effort.
Implemented multi‑stage workflow (JD analysis, strategy generation, resume build, critique) with structured outputs and versioned artifacts.
Emphasized maintainability and ATS alignment through consistent formatting and targeted keyword matching.
impact: Reduced resume customization time by automating job description analysis and resume tailoring workflow.
Improved alignment with ATS systems through structured keyword matching and consistent formatting.
Enhanced resume quality by introducing a multi-stage pipeline with analysis, strategy, and critique steps.
projects.technologies: Python, OpenAI API, CLI, JSON, Prompt Engineering, Async Processing, Git
